name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: A three-way junction in the tunnel system. This is a central hub of the alien ship.
NORTH leads toward the console room area, EAST continues deeper into the ship, WEST goes toward a force field room.
Explore all directions to map out the ship. EAST is the most productive path forward.
notes: Central three-way tunnel junction. North connects to room 3 (toward console), east to room 7 (deeper into ship), west to room 5 (toward force field room). Key navigation hub.
